basic_details.job_title: BGSSS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 438 Executive, Field Sales Officer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Baroda Global Shared Services Limited (BGSSS), a wholly owned subsidiary of Bank of Baroda, has released a recruitment notification for multiple job roles across various locations in India. This is an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking careers in banking operations, sales, IT, HR, and finance domains. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official BGSSS careers portal before the last date.

content_sections.heading: BGSSS Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: Baroda Global Shared Services Limited is hiring for multiple positions across different departments. The available roles are:

rows.job_role: Field Sales Officer (Loan - Home / Auto / Tractor / Education)
Executive - ATM / Reconciliation / Complaints / Debit Cards

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for BGSSS Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates with graduation in any discipline can apply for eligible roles Sales roles prefer candidates with experience in banking/financial products IT roles require relevant technical qualifications (Computer Science / IT) Finance and operations roles require commerce/finance background HR and admin roles require relevant management or HR qualifications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for BGSSS Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official BGSSS careers website Go to the “Current Openings” section Select the desired job role Register using email ID and mobile number Fill out the application form carefully Upload required documents Submit the application and save the confirmation copy

faq.question: Q1. What is BGSSS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: BGSSS Recruitment 2026 is a hiring drive by Baroda Global Shared Services Limited (a subsidiary of Bank of Baroda) for multiple banking and corporate job roles across India.

faq.question: Q2. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is conducted by Baroda Global Shared Services Limited (BGSSS), under Bank of Baroda.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: Multiple vacancies are available across different roles, including Field Sales Officer, Tele-Collection Agent, and others.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job location?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be placed across various locations in India.
